understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid, modifying my carried piece's attributes (shape, color, rotation) to match the requirements of goal cells, then step onto those goals to complete them. Once all goals in a level are completed, the level ends and I advance to the next one, aiming to finish all levels without running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each movement costs 1 stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and resets stamina to maximum. Running out of lives ends the game. I must avoid walls (blocked_directions indicate impassable directions). Stepping on modifier tiles changes my piece: shape modifier cycles shape (0-5), color modifier cycles color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise (0→90→180→270→0). Goals require all three attributes to match simultaneously. I successfully activated Goal 0 by using a rotation modifier to change from 270° to 0°, but then failed to navigate properly onto the goal due to walls and repeated blocked moves, never completing it despite it being activated.
